games.name: Connect the Pipes: Water Puzzle
games.description: Dozens of unique levels await you in this exciting puzzle game, where you need to show your logic and ingenuity! There are pipes, water sources and drains on the playing field. Your task is to turn the pipes so that the water from the source reaches the drain. But thats not all! Water comes in different colors, and to complete some levels you will have to mix the streams, creating new colors. Each drain may require a certain color of water, and the difficulty of the levels will increase, offering new mechanics and challenges.
games.instructions: Rotate pipes Tap a pipe on the board to rotate it Connect the water source to the desired drain Mix colors Water comes in different colors If the drain requires a certain color direct the streams from different sources into one pipe to mix them Fil

games.name: Merge the Coins: USSR!
games.description: A game in an unusual setting! Compete with friends and colleagues! In the game you have a game zone where coins fall and connect if they are the same! Connect as many coins as possible to get the biggest one, collect points! Become the first on the leaderboard! Play and relax!
games.instructions: 1 At first it will be easy to connect the coins but over time there will be more and more of them Once you connect the biggest coin in this game it will disappear and give you the most points

games.name: Toilet Paper Jam
games.description: Welcome to Toilet Paper Jam, a creative and fun brain puzzle game. In this game, your goal is to solve the toilet paper jams. Everyone needs a section of paper. Match similar rolls of toilet paper and use different lengths of paper properly.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Construction Site Simulator
games.description: Construction Site Simulator is a super fun simulation game that lets you experience various tasks on a construction site. In this game, you will be a worker on a construction site! Use different construction equipment to complete a series of challenging tasks!

games.name: Sky Corona Evasion
games.description: Sky Corona Evasion is an engaging mobile game developed by jojolife that thrusts players into a high-stakes aerial adventure. , this game combines the fast-paced elements of an endless runner with the precision and challenge of flight navigation. Players control an airplane, navigating through a sky filled with various obstacles and virus-like enemies, symbolizing the titular Corona. The primary objective is to achieve the highest possible distance without crashing, demanding quick reflexes and strategic maneuvering.
games.instructions: Right-click the mouse and move it

games.name: Word Chef Search Puzzle
games.description: Welcome to the Word Chef Search Puzzle, where you embark on a culinary adventure through a savory maze of letters to uncover delicious words hidden within! Web Dev &lt;a href='https://www.funcrazygames.com/'&gt;https://www.funcrazygames.com/&lt;/a&gt;
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Sprunki Money Stack Incredibox
games.description: Now Sprunki must gather as much money as possible, collect all the money and multiplied it to buy a new house and upgrades all his life behavior!

games.name: Lines 98 Old School
games.description: Classic puzzle Balls of Lines 98, made in old school style. Move the balls around the field so as to line up 5 balls of the same color in a row. Score points and take the first place in the leaderboard.
games.instructions: Control - touch the ball you want to move and with the second touch choose where to move this ball When playing from a computer select a ball with a mouse click and the next click indicate where to move this ball

games.name: Two Player Stick Steve and Alex
games.description: Steve and Alex, the stick figure characters, want to escape from the Nether world. To help them in this adventure, you must be two players. In this two-player game, you must escape from the Nether world with your friend. Be very careful while escaping because monsters are coming from everywhere and they never stop. Reach the portal at the end of the level safely.
games.instructions: Use the WASD and Arrow keys to move Avoid the monster at the end of the level and reach the portal at the end Double jump available

games.name: Launch The Sprunki
games.description: Sprunki Launch is an exciting physics-based game where you catapult Sprunki to destroy zombie heads and conquer thrilling challenges! As Sprunki, the fearless hero, you&amp;rsquo;ll launch yourself through spooky, haunted landscapes, aiming to eliminate all zombie heads standing in your way. Strategize your shots, break through tricky obstacles, and unleash powerful combos to clear each level. With increasing challenges, eerie settings, and special power-ups, your goal is simple: destroy all the zombie heads and achieve victory in this action-packed adventure!
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Moto Stunt Racing
games.description: Get ready to ride, race, and perform bike stunts in the amazing spider hero bike games. This game is all about racing and doing cool stunts on 3d bikes. Riding a gt bike on a Mega ramp and flying through the air, doing flips and bike tricks. Its like being a superhero on two wheels in motorcycle stunt bike race games 2024. Start an amazing adventure of extreme tricky moto stunts on sky-high mega ramps. Accept Motorbike race challenges.Grab your helmet and do the dare to perform extreme stunts on the mega ramps with the superhero motorcycle games 3D. Show your best skills to do the breathtaking stunts and have non-stop action with the spider bike race games 2024. Ride on mega ramps, dodge hurdles and defeat your rivals to be the number one racer of the superhero ramp stunt bike games 3D Ride a superhero mega ramp bike fast! Race against other stunt riders on different tracks. Choose a gt bike in Bike Stunt Games and make it go fast. Pay attention in superhero stunt bike race game track
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Eye Color DIY
games.description: This is an eye color art game for girls. Have you ever wondered what would happen if your eyes were a different color? Maybe you have a bold idea and want to make your own eye color and shine.If you want to try these, you cant miss our game. You can start by choosing an eye shape and color base. Then you must use the tools to mix the colors, add patterns, and apply effects.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Animal Name Puzzle
games.description: Animal Name Puzzle is an exciting word scramble game where players must rearrange a set of scrambled letters to form the name of an animal. The game offers a fun challenge by testing both word recognition and knowledge of animals, ranging from common pets to rare wild species. If you get stuck, you can use a hint to help you out. For a fresh twist, the shuffle button lets you change the arrangement of the letters, adding variety to each puzzle. Solve them all and discover a world of animals through this engaging word game!
games.instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to play this game

games.name: Real Car Parking And Stunt
games.description: Welcome to Real Car Parking And Stunt, a challenging driving simulation game. Here you&amp;rsquo;ll control a car and put your parking and stunt skills to the test. Choose stunt mode or parking mode, each level challenges you to park your car accurately while performing exciting stunts.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Incredible Kids Dentist
games.description: This is a dentist game for kids. Have you ever wanted to be a dentist? If this was your dream before, you should not miss this game. In this educational game, you can become a doctor in a hospital. You need to check the teeth of your patients.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Racing Ball Master 3D
games.description: Ready for a casual racing adventure? In Racing Ball Master 3D, you control a super-fast rolling ball. You will race against many opponents on a colorful 3D track. The track has obstacles and challenges like spinning windmills, roadblocks, etc. Every step tests your operations and reactions.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Sprunki Sniper Squid Game
games.description: In Sprunki Sniper Squid Game, players must stay still and wait for the sound to stop. Once the sound fades, each character, known as a Sprunki, is marked for elimination. Web Dev &lt;a href='https://www.playonline.top/'&gt;https://www.playonline.top/&lt;/a&gt; Players must carefully time their movements to avoid becoming a target of the sniper in this tense, strategic game.

games.name: Slippery Descent By Car
games.description: Pass obstacles on cars from the cube game! A hardcore game that takes you into an exciting world of gambling challenges. You have to conquer dangerous descents on various cars, overcoming the most difficult obstacles on the way to victory. Each level is unique, full of surprises and challenges!
games.instructions: The machines are controlled by the standard WASD keys or the arrows on the keyboard You can control the car in the air bull Space mdash handbrake bull C mdash change the camera view bull R mdash level reset bull H mdash main menu

games.name: Squid Game Sprunki Escaped Backrooms
games.description: Now Sprunki has a nightmare. He has transformed to the snake and have to escaped from Backrooms. Unfortunately Squid Game soldier lurking around search for him! Kill them all and escape! good luck
games.instructions: WASD Arrow Keys - move Mouse move - camera Space LMB - Head Up E Shift - Toggle Head Up R - Restart P - Pause Menu

games.name: Squid Game Match Survival
games.description: Experience the thrill of Squid Game Match, a survival-themed puzzle game for fans! Match tiles to progress through levels inspired by the show&amp;rsquo;s challenges. Perfect for those who love strategy games, this unique puzzle experience combines suspense, fun, and creativity. Will you survive the ultimate Squid Game puzzle challenge?
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Platform Drop
games.description: Circle Platform is a fun and addictive online game that tests your timing and precision skills. The objective is simple yet challenging: guide a ball to match and land perfectly on a moving platform. With vibrant visuals and smooth gameplay, Circle Platform keeps you engaged with its dynamic motion and increasing levels of difficulty.As you progress, the game introduces new twists, like faster-moving platforms and obstacles, to keep the gameplay exciting and test your reflexes. Circle Platform is perfect for quick sessions or extended play&amp;mdash;jump in and see how far you can go!
games.instructions: Tap or click to release the ball from its starting position Time your release to ensure the ball aligns with the rotating or moving platform Aim for the perfect drop to earn bonus points and unlock higher levels

games.name: Tiles Matching
games.description: Free online game Tiles Matching - play in the browser without downloading. It is suitable for the development of logic for both adults and children - an ideal timekiller. Tiles Matching is a puzzle game combining the game mechanics of Mahjong and Three in a Row (Match-3). A logical educational game for children and adults. With each level, the difficulty increases - not everyone can complete the game the first time. Challenge your intelligence.
games.instructions: Match 3 blocks of the same element so that they match each other Match and remove all the tiles to complete the level The game has a large number of levels that are becoming more difficult

games.name: 2048 Cubes
games.description: Endless 2048 game with a twist, blocks with physics. Blocks will colliide and bounce after collision. Drop and merge same numbers to reach higher numbers.
games.instructions: Swipe right and left to move the block and release to drop Merge blocks with same number to get a bigger block Increase your score with more blocks Game ends when the board fills up to the dashed line

games.name: Nightmare Couple Eternal Love
games.description: Step into the hauntingly beautiful world of Nightmare Couple Eternal Love, where romance and spookiness collide. This unique dress-up game lets you explore gothic fashion, eerie backdrops, and enchanting love between a mysterious couple. Whether you&amp;rsquo;re a fan of Halloween aesthetics or captivating storytelling, this game promises an unforgettable experience.

games.description: In Block Digger, Break through rocks, gather precious gems, and upgrade your mine to boost your fortune. Unlock new levels, chase rewards, and build a mining empire like no other. Easy to play, hard to put down&amp;mdash;start digging for treasure now!

games.name: Sprunki Stick
games.description: Hey help the Sprunki to stretch the stick the more you can to reach and walk on the platforms. Beware! If the stick is not long enough, you will fall down! Get yourself in the ninja action! How far can you go? Enjoy it!

games.name: Sprunki in Squid Game Chamber
games.description: In the heart of the notorious Squid Game Chamber, there is only one thing on Sprunki&amp;rsquo;s mind: survival. A place where every corner hides a threat, and every move could be their last, the Squid Game Chamber is not a place for the faint of heart. Its a world where tension runs high, and the air is thick with the terror of the unknown. Yet, despite the horror that surrounds them, Sprunki is determined to play the game&amp;mdash;no matter the cost. The game is simple in its premise but deadly in its execution: run, grab the coin, and escape. Sounds easy enough, doesn&amp;rsquo;t it? But in this hellish realm, nothing is ever that simple.
games.instructions: WASD - move

games.name: Witch And Fairy BFF
games.description: Two unusual girlfriends - a Fairy and a Witch - study together, although they are so different. Fairy, with her delicate pink outfits and impeccable sense of style, is always ready to offer fashion tips and create vivid images. Her girlfriend-Witch, who prefers a Gothic style, chooses mysterious and gloomy outfits. Players will be able to help both heroines choose outfits for various events: from dancing to magic lessons. Join magical friends in their exciting fashion adventure where style and magic go hand in hand!
games.instructions: Depending on the gaming device a computer mouse click or a simple touch on touchscreens is used to control it

games.name: Mahjongg Solitaire
games.description: Relax and unwind with Mahjongg Solitaire! Match pairs of mahjongg tiles to clear the board and complete each level. With beautiful designs and satisfying puzzles, it&amp;rsquo;s the perfect game for a peaceful challenge!

games.name: Plants vs Zombies Coloring
games.description: Plants vs. Zombies Coloring Game is a creative and relaxing game that lets players bring their favorite plants and zombies to life with vibrant colors. Dive into the world of Plants vs. Zombies and unleash your artistic talent by coloring iconic characters, scenes, and battles from the popular series. Choose your favorite plants, zombies, or scenes and add your personal touch by coloring them with a wide range of colors and tools. Save your masterpiece and share it with friends!
games.instructions: Mouse

games.name: Flex Escape
games.description: Flex Escape 3D is a fun game where you stretch and flex to avoid obstacles. Instead of running, you stay on a mat and use your flexibility to dodge furniture and appliances thrown at you. By moving left or right with simple controls, you can navigate through the challenges. Collecting gems helps unlock new objects, making the game even more exciting. The goal is to make it to the end without hitting any obstacles while staying focused and flexible.

Summon enemies with a portal gun! Collect points and become the first on the leaderboard, compete with your friends! Enjoy the game!
games.instructions: Your task is to destroy as many monsters as possible Collect points and get to the first place in the leaderboard Enjoy the game

games.name: Mecha Shoot Pixel Rpg
games.description: Enter the world of Mecha Shoot Pixel RPG. This is an exciting mix of shooting, RPG, and intense battle action. Control a powerful mecha in a pixelated style. Engage in nervous shooting combat against waves of monsters. You will control your direction and keep shooting at the enemy. Avoid their attacks and find the time to defeat them.

games.name: Toy Game For Kids
games.description: This is a collection of games for toddlers. Our games offer a variety of game modes including spinner, bubble blower, and surprise egg. They are anti-stress and relaxing games and toy gadgets designed to hone kids attention and motor skills. You can also press bubbles, play with crocodile toys, and more.

games.description: Join the high-speed action of Sprunki Run, an endless racing game packed with excitement! Dash through colorful worlds, dodge obstacles, and collect coins to unlock upgrades. Perfect for fans of fast-paced games, this endless runner will test your reflexes and keep you on the edge of your seat. How far can you go in the ultimate Sprunki race?

games.name: Silent Asylum 2
games.description: Silent Asylum 2 features eerie atmosphere of a foggy town where your mission is to shoot scary monsters using different weapons and find the exit on each level in order to progress with your adventure.

games.name: Newtons Fruit Fusion
games.description: Newtons Fruit Fusion is a fun and challenging game where you drop fruits onto the screen. Match similar fruits to create bigger ones. Plan your moves carefully, as the game gets harder with each level. Can you create the greatest fruit? Test your strategy and enjoy this exciting merging puzzle game!
games.instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to drop fruits

games.name: Pendulum Goal   Casual Physics
games.description: Pendulum Goal is an interactive game that allows players to explore the physical behavior of pendulums on different planets. The objective is to dodge swinging pendulums that move according to the gravity of each stage (Earth, Moon, and Jupiter). Besides being a fun experience, the game also teaches physics concepts, such as the relationship between a pendulum&amp;rsquo;s period and length based on the gravity of each environment.
games.instructions: How to Play Objective Avoid the pendulums while trying to score goals Controls The game is controlled with a single button to kick the ball

games.name: Squid Game Sprunki Hide
games.description: Squid game and sprunki hiding something. Reveal the fishy squid scattered around before time run out!

games.name: Climb Up
games.description: In this challenging adventure, youll embark on a perilous ascent up a massive, treacherous mountain. Navigate slippery surfaces and unpredictable obstacles as you make your way towards the summit, where eternal glory and a rewarding gift await. Will you be able to overcome the many hurdles and reach the top, or will the climb prove too daunting? Your determination and skill will be tested as you brave the unknowns of this grueling climb.
games.instructions: Use JoySticks

games.name: Noobik Parkour in a Cave!
games.description: The game has 10 hardcore levels! To complete the level, you need to get to the finish line, overcoming various obstacles, dodging various traps on your way!
